title: Visible Hair Reduction After 1 Epilfree Treatment
description: Reduction in visible facial hair following one Epilfree treatment. Results vary between clients and multiple treatments may be recommended for optimal long-term reduction.

title: Microneedling Skin Rejuvenation
description: Before-and-after example showing visible improvement in overall skin texture and the appearance of pigmentation following a microneedling treatment. Individual results vary depending on skin type, skin condition and the recommended treatment plan.

title: Microneedling – Skin Rejuvenation
description: Before-and-after example showing improvement in the appearance of skin texture and overall skin quality following a microneedling treatment. Individual results vary depending on skin type, skin condition and the recommended treatment plan.

title: Advanced Facial – Acne & Skin Clarifying Results
description: Before-and-after example showing improvement in the appearance of active breakouts, skin clarity and overall complexion following a professional facial treatment. Individual results vary depending on skin type, skin condition and the recommended treatment plan.

title: Cosmelan – Pigmentation Correction
description: Before-and-after example showing improvement in the appearance of uneven pigmentation and overall skin tone following a Cosmelan treatment programme. Individual results vary depending on skin type, pigmentation severity and adherence to the recommended home-care routine.
